description: Canonical cross-language parity scenario. Every official ORB SDK is expected to execute these steps in order and produce equivalent outcomes. Static conformance (each step matches a real spec operation) is enforced in CI via dev-tools/quality/validate_sdk_spec_conformance.py; per-language runtime parity is proposed future work — see sdk/parity/README.md 'Enforcement status'.

steps.name: health_check
steps.description: Verify the ORB server is running and reports a healthy or degraded status.
steps.on_failure: abort — if health check fails all subsequent steps are meaningless

steps.name: list_templates
steps.description: List all registered templates. The result may be empty; downstream steps are conditional on at least one template existing.

post_condition.if_empty: skip steps 3–5 and go directly to step 6

steps.name: request_machines
steps.description: Submit a provisioning request for 1 machine using the first template found in step 2. Skipped if no templates exist.

sdk_methods.csharp: await client.RequestMachinesAsync(new RequestMachinesRequest { TemplateId = firstTemplateId, Count = 1 })

steps.name: poll_request_status
steps.description: Retrieve the current status of the request created in step 3. Skipped if step 3 was skipped. Accept any valid status string.

response_shape.note: Some SDKs return the status directly; others return a wrapper with a requests array. Both forms are acceptable.

steps.name: return_machines
steps.description: If any machines were returned in step 4, submit a return request for them. Skipped if step 3 was skipped or no machines were provisioned.
steps.precondition: request_id is bound AND at least one machine_id is available from step 4

sdk_methods.csharp: await client.ReturnMachinesAsync(new ReturnMachinesRequest { MachineIds = new List<string> { machineId } })

response_shape.note: Return response shape varies by scheduler. Any 2xx with a JSON body is acceptable.

steps.name: list_requests
steps.description: List all requests. Verifies that the list endpoint is reachable and returns a collection. Always executed regardless of earlier steps.

equivalence_criteria: All steps that are not skipped must complete without a route-level 404 or 405 error.
Step 2 must return an array (possibly empty) in the templates field.
Step 3, when executed, must return a 2xx response and bind a non-empty request_id.
Step 4, when executed, must return a 2xx response with a status field or a requests array.
Step 5, when executed, must return a 2xx response.
Step 6 must return a 2xx response with a requests field or data field.
No SDK may produce a different HTTP status code than any other SDK for the same step when all SDKs are pointed at the same ORB server with the same config.
skip_rules: Steps 3–5 are skipped when step 2 returns an empty templates array.
Step 5 is skipped when step 4 returns no machine IDs.
An SDK may report a step as 'skipped' rather than 'failed' when its precondition is not met.
